name: housewarming_06
description: Housewarming party with open house style timing

input.subject: We moved! Come see our new place
input.snippet: We finally got the keys and moved in...
input.body_text:
Hey!

We finally got the keys and moved in! 🏠🎉

Come check out our new place:

HOUSEWARMING PARTY
Saturday, February 28th
4pm - 9pm

Our new address:
567 Willow Way, Apt 12B
Seattle, WA 98101

Drop by anytime during the party - no need to stay the whole time.
BYOB, we'll have snacks!

No gifts necessary, just bring yourselves!

See you there,
Chris & Jamie

events.title: Chris & Jamie's Housewarming Party
events.description: Housewarming party - drop by anytime, BYOB

notes: Casual housewarming with informal time format (4pm instead of 4:00 PM)
